stemHtml: During an IFR flight in VMC, if the aircraft encounters a sudden communication failure, the pilot must adhere to standard emergency procedures. What actions should be taken by the pilot?

options.a: Set 7500 on the transponder and continue according to the flight plan.
options.b: Set 7700 on the transponder and continue to the destination as filed.
options.c: Continue flying towards the destination as planned.
options.d: Continue in VMC and land at the nearest suitable aerodrome, then report the arrival as soon as possible.
